name: LG C5 65-inch movie mode home visit 16s
globalControl: Build the illusion of a late-night best-friend home visit where the protagonist casually recommends her newly replaced oversized OLED TV. Emotional tone: sincere sharing, cozy home comfort, elevated life quality. Opening shot should immediately reveal a modern living room corner in a vertical frame, with the protagonist standing slightly off to one side in front of a wall-flush or wall-mounted LG 65 Inch Class C5 Series TV shown mostly front-on with a slight side reveal so the 65-inch scale is obvious. Visual feel should match native iPhone 14 handheld footage with subtle breathing shake, slight auto-shutter motion blur, warm recessed downlights, realistic reflections on the ultra-thin metal bezel, soft shadow noise, no UI overlays, no recording indicators, and no second person visible on camera.

fragmentList.videoContent: Create one continuous 16-second vertical cinematic handheld video submitted as a single fragment, but internally perform the action beats in two time windows: 0-8s and 8-16s. Core illusion: a best friend visits after work and casually films a woman unintentionally recommending her newly replaced LG 65 Inch Class C5 Series TV. The environment is a tidy but lived-in modern living room. Required physical details: a minimalist black remote control on the TV console, a half-peeled orange on the sofa side table, a half-open balcony sliding door in the background, an unopened tissue box on the TV console edge, and a short visible black power cable. Lighting comes only from warm white recessed ceiling downlights, creating soft highlights on the protagonist's hair, faint natural eye-socket shadows, slight uneven exposure on the wall, and a deep black mirror-like off screen on the TV. The TV must remain perfectly wall-flush or wall-mounted with virtually zero gap, never move, remain turned off, and always appear large, front-dominant, premium, and ultra-thin. Protagonist: East Asian woman around 29 years old, deep brown shoulder-length hair with inward-curled ends and a few wispy bangs, oval face, defined nose bridge, natural wild brows, glossy rosy-bean lips, fair skin with realistic pores and slight natural oil reflection around the nose wings. Wardrobe: off-white chunky knit home sweater with a loose collar showing collarbones and sleeves casually rolled to the elbows. Camera POV: a friend casually holding a phone while visiting after work, with slight breathing shake and subtle vertical bob. Composition must keep the woman on one side while the full front view of the 65-inch TV remains visible behind her so the size feels truly huge relative to her body. During 0-8s, she smiles and jokes to the off-camera friend that the old TV always looked too gray and dull, while speaking very fast in natural English: This LG 65-inch TV is an absolute game changer for my movie nights. I can finally see every single stunning detail in perfect 4K resolution right now. Between 3-5s she casually brushes a loose strand of hair and lightly bites her lower lip while thinking. The camera takes one tiny step closer with a gentle vertical bump and focus subtly drifts between her and the huge TV before briefly acknowledging the ultra-thin side frame. During 8-16s, maintain exact continuity of room, person, and TV placement. She quickly blinks twice, leans slightly toward the TV, smiles with contagious warmth, then between 12-14s straightens slightly, turns less than 30 degrees, lightly taps the ultra-thin side bezel with her finger joint, and briefly rests her palm on the metal frame while nodding in satisfaction. She speaks quickly in natural English: Plus, OLED evo tech makes colors pop like crazy. WebOS is super easy to use. If you need an upgrade, click the link right now! The off-camera friend softly says: So high-end. In the final 2 seconds the camera pulls back slightly with a tiny laugh-induced wobble to reveal the full wall-flush 65-inch TV and her hand indicating the lower-right screen area. Strict negatives: absolutely no subtitles, no title text, no logos, no recording red dot, no social media interface, no TV playback content, no bright showroom lighting, no visible friend in frame, no reaching hand toward the lens, no spin over 30 degrees, and no visible wall gap behind the TV.
fragmentList.productReferenceDescription: LG 65 Inch Class C5 Series TV, extremely large 65-inch OLED television, ultra-thin premium metal bezel, front-dominant screen, tightly wall-flush installation, screen turned off with deep glossy black mirror finish.
fragmentList.negativePrompt: subtitles, title text, logos, UI overlays, recording red dot, social media interface, TV content playback, bright showroom lighting, second person visible, lens-reaching hands, TV separated from wall, visible wall gap, TV repositioning, spin over 30 degrees, studio perfection
